title: Intl formatter rebuilt each call
message: This is slow because new Intl.DateTimeFormat() rebuilds on every call inside a function, so move it to the top of the file, or wrap it in useMemo
help: Move `new Intl.NumberFormat(...)` to the top of the file or wrap it in `useMemo`. Building one is slow, so don't redo it on every call
